ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "known_as" TEXT /* Known name of the player (e.g., nickname) */,
  "shorthand" TEXT /* Shorthand name of the player (e.g., initials) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the player's nationality */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Current fitness level of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "club_crest_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Current season of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Clean sheets kept by the player in the match */,
  "conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the player in the match */,
  "penalty_goals" INTEGER /* Penalty goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "penalty_misses" INTEGER /* Penalty misses by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "pass_accuracy" INTEGER /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the manager is currently managing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "offense" TEXT /* Type of offense (e.g., foul, dissent) */,
  "sanction" TEXT /* Type of sanction (e.g., yellow card, red card) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_records_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
